title: Find Triangular Sum of an Array

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5] Output: 8 Explanation: The above diagram depicts the process from which we obtain the triangular sum of the array.

testcases.input: nums = [5] Output: 5 Explanation: Since there is only one element in nums, the triangular sum is the value of that element itself.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: Since there is only one element in nums, the triangular sum is the value of that element itself.
